articles.title: Impact of Health-Related Social Needs on Transcatheter and Surgical Aortic Stenosis Treatment.
articles.authors: Sadri S, Amponsah D, Beyene TJ, Burdon TA, Fearon WF et al.

articles.title: Tirzepatide therapy reduces subclinical leaflet thrombosis and paravalvular leak after transcatheter aortic valve replacement in obese patients: The TAVR-MET trial.
articles.journal: Cardiovascular revascularization medicine : including molecular interventions
articles.key_finding: BACKGROUND: Obesity is increasingly recognized as a critical modifier of outcomes following transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR), predisposing patients to subclinical leaflet thrombosis (SLT), hypo-attenuated leaflet thickening (HALT), and paravalvular leak (PVL).

articles.title: Lifetime management of aortic stenosis: a primer for the generalist.
articles.authors: Safdar NZ, Khedro T, Khan SA, Khan AH, Goldberg D et al.
articles.key_finding: Aortic stenosis affects millions globally and untreated disease approaches a one-year mortality of 50%.

articles.title: Biodegradable devices for transcatheter patent foramen ovale closure: current evidence and future directions.
articles.authors: Khan A, Khan M, Thyagaturu H, Shafi N, Muhibullah F et al.
articles.key_finding: Recent multicenter studies and a randomized trial report non-inferior closure rates compared with nitinol devices and near-complete resorption within 12 to 24 months.

articles.title: Research on the author collaboration network and institutional influence in the transcatheter aortic valve replacement field based on CiteSpace: analysis of the top one hundred highly cited articles.
articles.authors: Yuan L, Yu Q, Wang L, Xia J, Ma B

articles.title: Successful explantation of an EDWARDS INTUITY rapid deployment valve with concomitant annular enlargement.
articles.authors: Marsh JC, Bhamidipati CM, Doberne JW
articles.key_finding: CONCLUSION: Explantation of the Edwards Intuity rapid deployment valve with Rittenhouse-Manouguian annular enlargement is feasible and safe, offering a surgical option for SVD.

articles.title: Native T1 is independently associated with aerobic exercise capacity in long-term follow-up after mild initial COVID-19 disease (Impression COVID&Heart Study).
articles.journal: Journal of cardiovascular magnetic resonance : official journal of the Society for Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance
articles.authors: Rozewicz-Juraszek M, Mueller S, Ganbat M, Bolanos CR, Klement A et al.
articles.key_finding: Male sex, higher BMI, lower age, and higher native T1 were associated with lower %-predicted VO₂peak in univariate models.

articles.title: Isolated Transcatheter and Surgical Aortic Valve Replacement in the Evolut Low-Risk Trial: 5-Year Comparative Outcomes.
articles.authors: Ramlawi B, Deeb GM, Yakubov SJ, Mumtaz M, Chu MWA et al.
articles.key_finding: BACKGROUND: We aim to compare the 5-year outcomes of patients who received isolated transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) versus those who underwent isolated surgical aortic valve replacement (SAVR) from the Evolut Low Risk Trial.

articles.title: Surgical Bailout and Retrieval of Maldeployed Transcatheter Tricuspid Valve: Technical Considerations.
articles.authors: Johnson B, D'Alonzo N, Schwarze E, Walker JW, Yamane K
articles.key_finding: Although not technically challenging, patient comorbidities, prior operations, and location of the device all need to be considered.

articles.title: Achieving Commissural Alignment During Intra-Annular Self-Expandable Transcatheter Heart Valve Implantation With a Radiopaque Marker-Guided Technique.
articles.authors: Nishimura Y, Tanabe K, Higashino A, Yokozuka M, Horiuchi Y et al.

articles.title: Characterization of six environmental coli-phages isolated in Astana, Kazakhstan, during the School of Molecular and Theoretical Biology
articles.authors: Egorov, A. A.; Keda, K.; Klementiev, O. K.; Juozapaitis, J.; Akopova, D.; Basalaev, D.; Malinouskaya...
articles.key_finding: This expanded phage collection enhances the toolkit for investigating phage-host interactions and their molecular mechanisms and highlights the use of phage isolation as a component of high school research education.
